# 📚 Prompt Index — Complete Reference

All 24 prompts are now organized in `.github/prompts/` and discoverable via Copilot chat.

**Type `/` to invoke any prompt below.**

---

## 🔍 Research Prompts (7)

| Prompt | Use When | Output |
|--------|----------|--------|
| `/program-analysis` | Analyzing a specific program for fit | Program score, relevant courses, career outcomes, SOP talking points |
| `/alumni-career-mapping` | Researching career paths for graduates | 5–10 realistic job titles and companies |
| `/program-comparison` | Comparing two programs | Side-by-side comparison on curriculum, outcomes, location, STEM OPT, cost |
| `/job-role-deep-dive` | Understanding a specific job role | Day-to-day tasks, tools, performance markers, career ladder, visa implications |
| `/resume-bullets-analytics-lens` | Rewriting bullets for analytics emphasis | Quantified, analytical versions of marketing achievements |
| `/us-job-market-intelligence` | Identifying top hiring companies | Top 10 companies, hiring patterns, H-1B sponsorship, recruiting channels |
| `/scholarship-discovery` | Finding funding opportunities | University-specific, external scholarships, assistantships, deadlines |

---

## ✍️ SOP Prompts (8)

| Prompt | Use When | Output |
|--------|----------|--------|
| `/extract-core-story` | Starting SOP work | 3 narrative threads, inflection point, differentiators |
| `/draft-inflection-point` | Writing the pivotal moment | 100-word compelling paragraph explaining pivot to analytics |
| `/draft-full-sop` | Writing a complete SOP | 650-word school-specific SOP with anecdote, progression, goals |
| `/strengthen-weak-paragraphs` | Revising a specific paragraph | Improved, evidence-backed, specific paragraph |
| `/opening-hook-generator` | Crafting compelling opening | 5 different opening sentences with varied tones (curious, confident, ambitious, etc.) |
| `/adcom-review-simulation` | Getting admissions feedback | First impression, strengths, weaknesses, score /10 |
| `/cut-to-word-limit` | Trimming to word count | Ruthlessly edited SOP at target length |
| `/differentiation-check` | Reviewing multiple SOPs | Identifies duplicate/generic passages, suggests unique tailoring |

---

## 🎤 Interview Prompts (7)

### Admissions Interview (3)
| Prompt | Use When | Output |
|--------|----------|--------|
| `/generate-interview-questions` | Preparing for admissions interviews | 15 common questions with assessment criteria and answer frameworks |
| `/mock-interview-answer-review` | Evaluating an answer before interview | Feedback on directness, specificity, program alignment, improvements |
| `/why-analytics-answer` | Crafting core transition narrative | 60-second natural, spoken answer explaining pivot to analytics |

### F-1 Visa Interview (4)
| Prompt | Use When | Output |
|--------|----------|--------|
| `/generate-visa-interview-questions` | Preparing for visa interview | 25 consular officer questions with evaluation criteria and common mistakes |
| `/visa-answer-review` | Evaluating a visa answer | Feedback on ties to India, academic intent, financial clarity, conciseness |
| `/why-us-visa-answer` | Answering "Why US and not India?" | 45–60 second answer emphasizing academics and India ties |
| `/visa-mock-interview-session` | Full practice visa interview | 10-question mock with real-time feedback (✅ worked, ⚠️ concerns, 💡 improvements) |

---

## 📄 Resume Prompts (2)

| Prompt | Use When | Output |
|--------|----------|--------|
| `/ats-score-grader` | Evaluating resume ATS compatibility | 6-dimension composite score (keyword match, format, quantification, verbs, relevance, length) + top 5 priority fixes + human readiness rating |
| `/resume-generation` | Creating a school-specific resume | One-page tailored resume with alignment analysis and tailoring rationale |

---

## 🚀 How to Use These Prompts

### Quick Example Flow

**Goal: Write an SOP for NYU SPS**

1. **Start:** Type `/extract-core-story`
   - Paste your resume → Identify narrative threads
   
2. **Build:** Type `/draft-full-sop`
   - Provide core narrative + school-specific details → Get full draft
   
3. **Refine:** Type `/adcom-review-simulation`
   - Paste draft → Get admissions committee feedback + score
   
4. **Polish:** Type `/differentiation-check`
   - Compare with Rutgers SOP → Ensure unique tailoring

5. **Finalize:** Type `/cut-to-word-limit`
   - Trim to exact word count without losing key arguments

---

## 💡 Pro Tips

- **Research before writing:** Use research prompts to gather program intelligence first
- **Build narratives:** SOP prompts work best in sequence (extract → draft → review → refine)
- **Practice interviews:** Use interview prompts 2–3 weeks before actual interviews
- **Resume optimization:** Use ATS grader before generation, then generate school-specific versions
- **Reuse inputs:** Save your "core narrative" and resume once — reuse across multiple prompts

---

**Location:** All prompts live in `.github/prompts/` organized by category  
**Access:** Type `/` in Copilot chat to discover  
**Update:** Add new prompts by creating `.prompt.md` files in the appropriate subcategory folder
